title: IIT Hyderabad Half marathon
description: The motivation for this event is to promote fitness, teamwork, and community spirit by bringing together IITH and the surrounding local community.

title: National Wellbeing Conclave
description: IIT Hyderabad hosted India's first 'National Wellbeing Conclave' for colleges and universities, supported by the central education ministry

title: Plantation drive
description: NSS IITH organizes the Plantation drive most frequently, and most of the students participate actively in this activity cheerfully.

title: IITH workshop on critical minerals
description: The workshop brings together researchers, academicians, and industry leaders from India and Australia.

title: World Tour of Solar Butterfly at IITH
description: 12000 saplings of 38 native plant species planted in Miyawaki Method

title: IITH sets up waste management system on campus
IIT-Hyderabad develops way to improve solar cells
description: IIT Hyderabad has developed a process to improving the performance of third generation solar cells by working with Dye Sensitized Solar Cells
